creator: lth@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hm. This is a development release, which we do not normally put into
the ports tree, so I'm a bit reluctant.

Looking at http://matrix.cpantesters.org/?dist=List-MoreUtils%200.22;reports=1;os=freebsd;perl=5.10.1
there are no test failures with the current version:

Also, I can not see that this breakage on 5.10.1 has been reported in
rt.cpan.org?

Could you provide me with logs showing the failure, and your 5.10.1
ports stucture, so I can try to replicate this?


/Lars
